name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Description**
<!-- What feature would you like? -->

**Use Case**
<!-- Why do you need this? What problem does it solve? -->

**Proposed Solution**
<!-- How do you think this should work? -->

**Alternatives Considered**
<!-- Are there workarounds or other approaches? -->

**Note**: minimp4 follows a minimal, zero-dependency, header-only philosophy. Features that add external dependencies, significantly increase code size, or go beyond core MP4 mux/demux are unlikely to be accepted.
